system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Any Melee against Parry at -1d10
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You make a single, carefully aimed and timed blow that bites deeply into the flesh of your opponent. This Technique requires a bladed weapon. Make a Melee roll against the opponent’s parry at a -1d10 penalty. On a Success, roll twice the normal Damage, and for the purpose of determining Damage, subtract your Ranks in Waijia from the opponent’s Hardiness. On a Total Success, the Attack also inflicts an Extra Wound. Cathartic: On a Cathartic use do Extra Wounds equal to 1+Qi Rank. Additionally, when you are determining Damage for this Attack, you may subtract twice your Ranks in Waijia from your opponent’s Hardiness.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: This Technique requires a bladed weapon.
system.catharticEffect: On a Cathartic use do Extra Wounds equal to 1+Qi Rank. Additionally, when you are determining Damage for this Attack, you may subtract twice your Ranks in Waijia from your opponent’s Hardiness.
